name: ASUS ROG MAXIMUS Z690 HERO ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 5x M.2 Slots - 2x Thunderbolt 4 Type-C - HDMI - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E - BT 5.2
shortName: ASUS ROG MAXIMUS Z690 HERO ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Premium ASUS ROG gaming ATX motherboard with dual PCIe 5.0 slots and DDR5 support for extreme overclocking.
